**[IMPORTANT] Review RSU Award Agreements**

You have received and signed RSU award agreements from Bytedance Ltd.

Please review all signed agreements before 23:59 on [2025-05-30](UTC+08:00). Please log into Feishu ESOP in accordance with the instructions below.
 
You may wish to consider certain financial and other information about Bytedance Ltd., which is available on [iDeals Virtual Data Room](https://auth.idealsvdr.com/login?ReturnUrl=https:%2F%2Fauth.idealsvdr.com%2Fconnect%2Fauthorize%2Fcallback%3Fresponse_type%3Dcode%26client_id%3Dvdr3%26state%3Dy6kFxO7UId897XirU6dce2DP8K7bkDA2ZL7OSPlIXZg;https%253A%252F%252Fwww3.idealsvdr.com%252Fv3%252FUS_disclosure%252F%253FReturnUrl%253Dhttps%25253a%25252f%25252fwww3.idealsvdr.com%25252fv3%25252fUS_disclosure%25252f%252523%25252fsettings%25252fagreement%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww3.idealsvdr.com%252Fv3%252FSso2RedirectUri%26scope%3Dopenid%2520profile%2520api%2520offline_access%26code_challenge%3D_AYy6twxS5aoeo7t-OgVJzKD4K0nz7rKdju8Nd7qfbQ%26code_challenge_method%3DS256%26room%3Dwww3.idealsvdr.com_US_disclosure%26room_name%3DUS_disclosure).

Login: [https://esop.bytedance.com](https://google.com). If this is your first time to log in, please click "Log in with Lark."
